# Fintech Regulatory Source Map (KR)

## Primary Sources

- **law.go.kr** — official statute portal — Grade A — primary source for KR statutes and decrees.
- **example.gov/fintech** — placeholder for FSC official site — Grade A — primary source for regulator guidance.
- **supremecourt.go.kr** — court decisions database — Grade A — primary source for case law.

## Secondary Sources

- **Practitioner law-firm fintech newsletters** — Grade B — secondary commentary.
- **Korean academic journals on financial regulation** — Grade B — academic commentary.
- **Regulator press release feeds** — Grade B — official-adjacent secondary source.
